hero.title: INDIA'S CITIZEN
hero.subtitle: Find every government scheme
hero.description: Tell us a few details about yourself - age, income, occupation, state - and we'll match you with central & state government schemes you may be eligible for. Free, private, and built for every Indian citizen.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps. No paperwork. No middlemen.

step1.title: Share your details
step1.description: Fill a short form - age, gender, state, income, and supporting documents.

step2.title: Get matched instantly
step2.description: Our rule-based engine compares your profile against scheme eligibility criteria and ranks the best matches.

step3.title: Apply with confidence
step3.description: Read benefits, required documents, and direct links to the official government portals to apply.

cta.title: Ready to discover your benefits?
cta.description: Takes less than 2 minutes. Your data stays private and is used only to match you with relevant schemes.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to view your matched schemes.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Save matches and bookmark schemes for later.
signup.passwordHint: Must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.passwordStrength: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number

userProfile.title: Tell us about yourself
userProfile.subtitle: Fill your details to find eligible government schemes
